    localStorage.setItem('mc_ram', ramValue.toString())
    localStorage.setItem('mc_show_forge', showForge.toString())
    localStorage.setItem('mc_show_snapshots', showSnapshots.toString())

<div className="settings-checkbox-group" style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: '8px' }}>

                  <label style={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: '8px', color: '#aaa', fontSize: '13px', cursor: 'pointer' }}><input type="checkbox" checked={showSnapshots} onChange={e => setShowSnapshots(e.target.checked)} /> {t("app.showSnapshots")}</label>

Description: Format Ely.by UUID with hyphens to fix older Minecraft versions crashing or failing to parse the UUID
Instruction: Format data.selectedProfile.id to include hyphens
TargetContent:
return {
      type: 'elyby',
      username: data.selectedProfile.name,
      uuid: data.selectedProfile.id,
      token: data.accessToken,
      clientToken: data.clientToken,
      skinUrl: `https://ely.by/services/skins-renderer?url=https://skinsystem.ely.by/skins/${data.selectedProfile.name}.png&scale=5&renderFace=1`
    }

Description: Add background to mods, modpacks, and servers tabs
Instruction: Modify the style attribute of .jl-main to apply the secondary background image for 'installations', 'modpacks', and 'servers' tabs.
ReplacementContent:
<div className="jl-main" style={
          view === 'play' || view === 'skins' ? { backgroundImage: mainBgDataUrl ? `url("${mainBgDataUrl}")` : 'url("./background.jpg")' } : 
          (view === 'installations' || view === 'modpacks' || view === 'servers' ? { backgroundImage: secBgDataUrl ? `url("${secBgDataUrl}")` : 'url("./bg-minecraft.png")' } : {})
        }>
